extortion.description: Catholic Charities, a ministry of the Catholic Diocese of Albany, is committed to active witness on behalf of the Scriptural values of mercy and justice. Catholic Charities, recognizing human need at all stages of life, responds to all persons regardless of race, creed, or lifestyle, with special emphasis on the economically poor and the vulnerable. Catholic Charities serves and empowers persons in need, advocates for a just society, calls forth and collaborates with women and men of good will in fulfillment of its mission. Catholic Charities of the Diocese of Albany is one of the largest, private, social service agencies in the region, helping more than 89,000 people each year in the fourteen counties of the Albany Diocese. Our motive is simple: to address basic human need at all stages of life regardless of race, religious belief, ethnicity, or lifestyle with special emphasis on the poor and vulnerable in our society. Catholic Charities offers a wide spectrum of services. ===> Revenue: $5 Million Employees: 66 Industry: Organizations Data:200gb Phone Number: (518) 453-6650 Employees: Mary Keniry (Program Director / LONG TERM CARE OMBUDSMAN PROGRAM)  ---> 518-925-0211 Kristine Eagan - (Program Coordinator PT / HIICAP) ---> (518) 579-3344   Lauren Benoit (Program Director / CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM) ---> 518-817-0059 Marlene Hildenbrandt - (Executive Director / ADMINISTRATION) ---> 518-491-9235 Karen Helms - (Administrative Assistant PT / ADMINISTRATION) ---> (518) 372-5675  Colleen Henry - (Program Secretary / ADMINISTRATION) ---> (518) 372-5668 James Willis - (Senior Accountant / ADMINISTRATION) ---> (518) 579-3348 Jennifer Doherty - (Elder Care Manager/ AGING LIFE SERVICES) ---> 518-545-6631 Amy Carman - (Elder Care Manager/ AGING LIFE SERVICES) ---> 518-275-8700 Cody Jacobson (IT Security Officer) ---> 518-453-6650 Cathy Krom ---> 518-453-6650  Louise Novak (coordinator NUTRITION OUTREACH) ---> 518-312-2770 Noelle Marie - Coordinator (ONG TERM CARE OMBUDSMAN PROGRAM) ---> 518-573-0985
